step_rationale: Downregulated in ACS; cardioprotective metabolite; reflects altered post-MI metabolic signaling.
mechanism: Kynurenic acid, derived from tryptophan metabolism, is downregulated in acute coronary syndromes; reduced levels reflect metabolic dysregulation and impaired cardioprotection.

references.title: Kynurenic Acid Is a Predictive Prognostic Metabolic Marker in ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction.
AVID mouse: A versatile platform for real-time, multiscale ATP imaging and spatial systems metabolism analysis in living mice.
Kynurenic acid, a key L-tryptophan-derived metabolite, protects the heart from an ischemic damage.
Urinary metabonomic study of patients with acute coronary syndrome using UPLC-QTOF/MS.
references.journal: Journal of chromatography. B, Analytical technologies in the biomedical and life sciences
